package.name: sbg_driver_core
package.description: ROS-agnostic C++23 wrapper around the SBG Systems sbgECom C SDK. Provides RAII Device, typed Configurator commands, std::variant-based Transport (Serial/UDP/File), std::expected-based error propagation, and non-owning LogView types for sensor data parsing. No rclcpp dependency — unit testable without ROS infrastructure.
